{{Quote|I asked if you thought Sumichan should go with you, or if you'd like me to keep her here to work on her maneuvers.|Eprill|<ref name="Force Heretic I" />}}
'''Eprill''' was a [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who flew with [[Vanguard Squadron (Hapes)|Vanguard Squadron]] and [[Twin Suns Squadron]] during the final stages of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

{{Char-stub}}
